title: T-023 — Packing slip + BOL generation Server Actions (PDF + SHA-256 hash + BRCGS 7y retention) (11-shipping-f)
prompt:
# T-023 — Packing slip + BOL Server Actions

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §13.3 Allergen labelling EU 1169/2011, §13.5 BOL PDF structure, §14.4 BRCGS Issue 10 7y BOL retention, §14.7 21 CFR Part 11 e-sig (P2), §11 V-SHIP-LBL-01, V-SHIP-LBL-04
Prototype refs: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx:741-757 (packing_slip_regen_modal), :759-790 (bol_sign_upload_modal)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Actions for generating packing slip PDF + BOL PDF + uploading signed BOL with SHA-256 hashing and BRCGS retention policy.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/documents.ts` exports:
   - `generatePackingSlip(shipmentId)` — server-rendered PDF (use @react-pdf/renderer or similar) per §13.5; consumer of product.allergens with EU 1169/2011 bold formatting (V-SHIP-LBL-01); uploads to Supabase Storage `shipping-docs/packing-slips/<org>/<shipmentId>.pdf` with `x-upsert: false`; UPDATE shipments.packing_slip_url; outbox `shipping.packing_slip.generated`. Permission `ship.pack.close`.
   - `regeneratePackingSlip(shipmentId, reason)` — re-generates with version suffix; audit reason.
   - `generateBOL(shipmentId)` — server-rendered PDF per §13.5; uploads to `shipping-docs/bols/<org>/<shipmentId>.pdf`; computes SHA-256 server-side (node:crypto); stores hash in `shipments.bol_pdf_hash` (new column to add via migration in this task) + `bol_pdf_url`. Permission `ship.pack.close`.
   - `uploadSignedBOL(shipmentId, file)` — accept multipart PDF/JPG/PNG ≤10 MB; server SHA-256; upload to `shipping-docs/bols-signed/<org>/<shipmentId>.<ext>`; apply immutability policy via Supabase Storage tag `brcgs_retention=true`; INSERT/UPDATE shipments.bol_signed_pdf_url, signed_at, driver_name, signature_date, signed_hash; outbox `shipping.bol.signed`. Permission `ship.bol.sign`. P2 hook: e-sign PIN re-verify via @monopilot/e-sign (T-124) BEFORE upload permitted — P1 = optional.
2. Migration `00XX_shipping_bol_columns.sql` — ADD COLUMN shipments.bol_pdf_hash text, signed_hash text, signed_at timestamptz, driver_name text, signature_date date.
3. Storage retention: Supabase Storage RLS + lifecycle tag `brcgs_retention=true` enforces immutability — never DELETE BOL objects for 7 years (V-SHIP-LBL-04).
4. All Server Actions under `withOrgContext`. Rate-limit 30/min/user.
5. Allergen consumer: query product.allergens (NPD T-001 product table) for each line and bold per EU 1169/2011 in PDF.

## Files
- apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/documents.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/__tests__/documents.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/pdf/packing-slip.tsx [create — @react-pdf/renderer template]
- apps/web/lib/pdf/bol.tsx [create]
- packages/db/migrations/00XX_shipping_bol_columns.sql [create]
- packages/events/src/shipping.ts [modify — ShippingPackingSlipGenerated, ShippingBOLSigned]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given generatePackingSlip for a shipment with allergenic product, when PDF is rendered, then each allergen appears in <strong> bold per EU 1169/2011 (V-SHIP-LBL-01) — verified by PDF text extraction.
2. Given generateBOL succeeds, when shipments row is inspected, then bol_pdf_url + bol_pdf_hash (SHA-256) are set, and the stored object exists at the expected Supabase Storage path.
3. Given uploadSignedBOL with a valid PDF, when action succeeds, then bol_signed_pdf_url, signed_hash, signed_at, driver_name, signature_date are persisted; storage object has tag `brcgs_retention=true`.
4. Given an attempt to upload an oversized file (>10 MB), when validator runs, then throws `FileTooLargeError` and no storage object created.
5. Given a DELETE is attempted against a stored BOL within 7 years, when Supabase Storage RLS evaluates, then it is blocked (V-SHIP-LBL-04 immutability).
6. Given grep current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id') on documents.ts, when run, then zero matches.

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest with testcontainers Postgres + mocked Supabase Storage client asserting AC 1-6.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run documents.test.ts && pnpm typecheck`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip SHA-256 hashing on either generateBOL or uploadSignedBOL (V-SHIP-LBL-04).
- Do not allow DELETE of stored BOLs (BRCGS retention 7y).
- Do not omit `x-upsert: false` on Storage uploads (immutability).
- Do not implement multi-language packing slips in P1 (P2 per BL-SHIP-12).
- Do not call mutations outside withOrgContext.
- Do not log file contents — only metadata.
- Do not skip allergen bold formatting in PDF (V-SHIP-LBL-01).

pipeline_inputs.description: Packing slip + BOL PDF Server Actions + signed BOL upload with SHA-256 + BRCGS 7y immutability tag.
pipeline_inputs.details: PDF via @react-pdf/renderer. Allergen bold per EU 1169/2011. SHA-256 server-side (node:crypto). Supabase Storage with x-upsert:false + brcgs_retention=true tag.
out_of_scope: Do not implement multi-language packing slips (P2 per BL-SHIP-12).
Do not implement HAZMAT/EUDR (Phase 2 per BL-SHIP-13).

Given generateBOL succeeds, when shipments inspected, then bol_pdf_url + bol_pdf_hash (SHA-256) set + storage object exists; AND given uploadSignedBOL with valid PDF, then bol_signed_pdf_url, signed_hash (SHA-256), signed_at, driver_name, signature_method set; retention_until = signed_at + 7 years (BRCGS Issue 9 §3.5 / §14.4).
Given oversized file (>10 MB), when validator runs, then throws FileTooLargeError, no storage object; AND given DELETE attempt within 7y, when Storage RLS evaluates, then blocked (V-SHIP-LBL-04).
Given grep current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id') on documents.ts, when run, then zero matches.

Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run documents.test.ts && pnpm typecheck`.

Do not call mutations outside withOrgContext.
Do not skip allergen bold formatting.
